data.title: Signet Jewelers names Carter's exec as new chief digital and technology officer
data.description: Raghu Sagi joined Signet Jewelers, taking over the chief digital and technology officer (CDIO) position as the retailer seeks to strengthen its ecommerce sales and omnichannel capabilities.

data.title: 21st Century HealthCare launches direct-to-consumer ecommerce
data.description: For 21st Century HealthCare, the ecommerce launch is an expansion of its digital capabilities rather than a replacement for its retail and wholesale distribution model.

data.title: P&G sharpens ecommerce and AI as Q2 sales stay soft
data.description: P&G built a structured data lake “stocked with petabytes of relevant data,” along with AI-enabled tools for media creation, shelf optimization and supply chain systems that can respond more quickly to retail demand signals.

data.title: Credit Key raises $90 million to expand B2B payments platform
data.description: It plans to use the new funding to expand its U.S. merchant base, strengthen platform partnerships and add features that integrate with existing ecommerce and sales systems.

data.title: Amazon adds Health AI assistant to One Medical
data.description: The agentic AI tool, which Amazon calls Health AI, is now available to One Medical members following a beta launch in early 2025.
